_comment: Scene-anchored narration for the HarnessStory walkthrough. Cloned from reference.wav (the user's voice). Anchors map to scenes in HarnessStory.tsx.

sections.text: Independent bakeries throw out nearly forty percent of what they bake. The waste isn't ignorance. It's uncertainty.
Here's how it works. First, connect your sales, a CSV export or your point of sale. Two weeks of history is enough to start.
Every morning you get tomorrow's bake plan. Three options per item, each with the expected waste, stockout risk, and units sold.
Then it does what static tools don't. Every night it replays its own forecasts and finds where it systematically missed.
It proposes a correction, validated on held-out sales. Here, croissants ran high every Wednesday, and the fix cuts error from three percent to two.
You approve in one tap. The next forecast applies it. Controlled, and fully auditable.
And every shop evolves its own playbook. Bukit Bintang learned Wednesdays, Subang learned Sundays. Same model, different corrections.
The model stays frozen. The skills evolve. BakerySense, a self-evolving harness for perishable businesses.
